Featured Tools

Start with the core tool set.

These highlighted tools are the fastest entry points for readability, writing checks, metadata work, and campaign support.

Writing Tool Open tool

Word Counter

Check word count, character count, sentence count, paragraph count, and estimated reading time for any text.

Free to use Open Tool
Content Clarity Open tool

Readability Checker

Review how easy your text is to read and improve clarity for blogs, academic writing, emails, and web content.

Free to use Open Tool
SEO Review Open tool

Keyword Density Checker

Review keyword frequency in content and identify overuse, underuse, or imbalance in search-focused copy.

Free to use Open Tool
Metadata Tool Open tool

Meta Tag Generator

Create clean meta titles, descriptions, and essential head tags for pages that need better search presentation.

Free to use Open Tool
Ad Metrics Open tool

CPC & ROAS Calculator

Estimate campaign efficiency, ad spend performance, and return on ad spend for practical decision-making.

Free to use Open Tool
Campaign Tracking Open tool

UTM Builder

Build trackable links for paid campaigns, social posts, email promotions, and marketing experiments.

Free to use Open Tool
How it works

Action first. Learning second.

The site is designed so a visitor can solve a task quickly, then continue into related content when they want more context.

1. Pick a tool

Start with the task you need to complete right now.

2. Get the result

Use a focused interface without extra noise or clutter.

3. Read the guide

Move into articles that explain the topic in a simple way.
